name: AFTON FAMILY SLEEPOVER
description:
"🇴‌🇭‌, 🇱‌🇴‌🇴‌🇰‌ 🇼‌🇭‌🇴‌'🇸‌ 🇭‌🇪‌🇷‌🇪‌ 🇹‌🇴‌ 🇨‌🇷‌🇦‌🇸‌🇭‌ 🇹‌🇭‌🇪‌ 🇵‌🇦‌🇷‌🇹‌🇾‌"

You've been invited to the Afton's house for a sleep over!
Though, its not what you expected, Michael is just being a jerk, Evans scared out of his mind, and Elizabeth just wants to have a good time...Who's side are you taking?
